## G1 Review Gate (n3) — Issue #278 — code-reviewer (opus)

npm test exit code: 0 (all 4 editions: claude, codex, gitlab, gitea). validate-script-sync passed (no byte-identity drift). Both new forge-helper test files run in-chain via the gitlab/gitea walkthroughs and were also run directly — all 10 new tests pass.

### Criteria
1. Marker-deletion contract CORRECT: both clearAdvisoryClaim remove label, post cleared note/comment, then list+delete `<!-- kw:claim project=<slug> -->` (scoped includes() preferred, generic /<!--\s*kw:claim\s+project=/ fallback when slug null). Outer+inner try/catch never throws. OFFLINE short-circuits before any network call.
2. Call-site completeness COMPLETE: all 4 invocations per port thread the slug (gitlab claim.js 914,990,1237,1258; gitea claim.js 900,977,1224,1245) — finalize=args.project, discard/release + MR/PR merged + MR/PR closed = folder.project.
3. Parity HOLDS: GitLab, Gitea, GitHub #275 (scripts/kaola-workflow-claim.js 463-475) identical contract/regex/try-catch.
4. Forge helpers CORRECT + EXPORTED: gitlab deleteIssueNote (DELETE projects/:id/issues/:iid/notes/:id, glabExec seam); gitea deleteIssueComment (-X DELETE /api/v1/repos/<full_name>/issues/comments/<id>, teaExec seam).
5. No wrong-comment deletion: only kw:claim project= family targeted; tests assert cleared note (103) + plain comment (104) + other-project marker (102) preserved.
6. Test quality STRONG: assert DELETE id/path, scoped-over-generic, generic fallback, no-false-positive, OFFLINE skip (with require-cache busting).

### Non-blocking notes
- LOW / pre_existing: classifier read-side detector matches (project|sess)= but no edition ever WRITES sess=; project=-only deletion is faithful to #275. Out of scope. action: none.
- LOW / in_scope: scoped branch uses exact slug string-equality, no generic re-fallback on a mismatched slug — byte-identical to shipped #275; slug derives from same folder context on write and clear, so de-risked. Stated assumption, not an actionable defect. action: none / status: documented.

Verdict: APPROVE — contract correct, parity with #275 holds, all call sites covered, helpers/exports correct, tests assert real behavior, full npm test green. findings_blocking: 0.
